subcodes.title: Two Kinds of Prophecy
subcodes.first_line: The Prophets of God draw upon both His boundless universal grace and upon His particular grace, that is, upon divine revelation and inspiration.
subcodes.first_line_orig: انبیا را استفاضه از فیض عمومی نامتناهی الهی و همچنین استفاضه از فیض
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @special knowledge of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment
